Notes: 2007 NCAA Division III Women's Basketball Championship first-round game.
Gwynedd-Mercy will play the NYU-Ursinus winner in the second round Saturday
Gwynedd-Mercy is ranked #25 in the ESPN/USA Today Division III Poll.
Game.Officials: Robert Csigi,  Pastor Torres,  Jeff Krantz,  Thomas Decker
